Read `AGENTS.md` before generating code.

Key constraints:

- Player actions are policy-controlled requests.
- Safety automation overrides player preference.
- A plot has only one active lease and crop cycle.
- Manual farm work uses work orders and evidence.
- Harvest entitlement belongs to the assigned player lease.
- Use English for code, comments, commits, and API fields.
- Keep the backend modular monolith.
- Do not add blockchain to MVP core.
- Add tests and update documentation when behavior changes.
